data.name: SEX Sport College 💦🏅
data.detailed_description:
Sex Sport College 💦🏅 introduces you to the stormy world of college basketball - competition and desire collide here, creating a unique visual novel with point-and-click elements.
In this game, you’ll step into the shoes of a former pro athlete, temporarily coaching a women’s college basketball team after his sister, the team’s coach, breaks her leg.

Although not caring much initially, the MC’s perspective shifts after witnessing a loud quarrel with an opposing team’s manager. Determined to restore his sister’s reputation and bring the team to victory, he takes on the challenge of helping the underdog team get to the championship status.

While training your team to get the sweet victory, you’ll face the challenge of earning the respect and loyalty of each player. The way you coach and interact impacts your relationships with girls. You’ll have to find your way around - prepare to meet hot-headed Aisha, reserved and passionate yet struggling with self-confidence Miyako, laid-back Vivi and many other characters.

Guided by a drive for victory, you’ll engage in the highs and lows of the sports world, balancing tension, ambition, and intimacy. Will you be able to transform this struggling team into champions, or will personal challenges get in the way?


Features:
  • Adult scenes - enjoy hot & lewd 18+ animated scenes
  • Various characters - each has a distinct personality, backstory, and motivations that deepen the narrative
  • High-stake story - help the team to rise while rebuilding your career from ashes
  • Mini-games - play basketball and enjoy dynamic mini-games during the adult scenes
  • Beautiful visuals - stunning graphics and fluid animations bring the team’s world to life
  • Choices make a difference - every decision made will affect the outcome, opening multiple endings

data.short_description: Welcome to our fresh adult visual novel! Hot college girls playing basketball, and you’re coaching them - could you ask for more? Meet the team, get to know their deepest secrets, help them win and bring the prize home in Sex Sport College 💦🏅!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: Apple M1 або Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
